title: rubus infestus
intro: Rubus infestus, also known as the bramble or wild rose, is a type of thorny shrub native to various parts of the world. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rubus infestus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. Rubus infestus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
